title: JRose Collections Kids Mega Lucky Bag 3 Pack Set – Dinosaur, Unicorn & Princess Bags with 8 Surprises Each – Toys, Games, Crafts, Stickers & Activity Sheets – Party Bag Fillers & Fun Activities
features: 🎉 3 Pack Mega Lucky Bag Bundle – Includes Dinosaur, Unicorn & Princess themes, each filled with exciting toys, stickers, puzzles, and crafts.
🧩 8 Fun Surprises in Every Bag – Discover toys, activity sheets, stickers, and games for hours of creative fun and learning.
✏️ Free Activity Sheets – Each bag comes with themed puzzles, colouring pages, word searches, mazes, or matching games that keep kids learning while they play.
🧸 Perfect for Kids Ages 3+ – Great as party bag fillers, classroom rewards, travel activities, or surprise treats to keep little ones entertained.
✅ Safe & UKCA/CE Certified – All contents meet UK safety standards; not suitable for children under 3 years.
description: Product description Unwrap excitement with this 3 Pack Kids Mega Lucky Bag Set, featuring Dinosaur, Unicorn & Princess themes. Each colourful bag contains 8 fun surprises, including toys, stickers, crafts, puzzles, and more – every bag is different, so children enjoy variety every time. Each bag also includes a free themed activity sheet packed with educational challenges like colouring, tracing, mazes, word searches, and matching games – blending fun with learning. Perfect as party bag fillers, school rewards, travel activities, or surprise treats, these Mega Lucky Bags bring joy, creativity, and endless fun to kids while being safe and tested to UKCA/CE standards. ⚠️ Safety Warning: Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts. Use under adult supervision. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. Small parts – choking hazard. Use under adult supervision.
